revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.

revision.text:
{{旧暦5月}} '''旧暦5月1日'''（きゅうれきごがつついたち）は、[[5月 (旧暦)|旧暦5月]]の1日目である。六曜は[[六曜#大安|大安]]である。
== できごと == * [[慶長]]7年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1602年]][[6月20日]]） - [[徳川家康]]が諸大名に[[二条城]]造営を命じる
== 誕生日 == * [[慶長]]10年（グレゴリオ暦[[1605年]][[6月17日]]） - [[由井正雪]]、軍学者・[[慶安の変]]首謀者（+ [[1651年]]） * [[享保]]18年（グレゴリオ暦[[1733年]][[6月12日]]） - [[円山応挙]]、[[画家]]（+ [[1795年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[建治]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1275年]][[5月27日]]） - [[藤原為家]]、[[歌人]]（* [[1198年]]） * [[天保]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1838年]][[6月22日]]） - [[橋本宗吉]]、[[蘭学者]]・大坂蘭学の始祖（* [[1763年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|4|30|5|2|4|1|6|5|0501}} ※ただし、[[小の月]]の前日は[[4月29日 (旧暦)|4月29日]]。
[[Category:untranslated pages]][[ja:5月1日 (旧暦)]][[Category:new pages]]

== Events == * [[慶長]]7年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1602年]][[6月20日]]） - [[徳川家康]]が諸大名に[[二条城]]造営を命じる
== Births == * [[慶長]]10年（グレゴリオ暦[[1605年]][[6月17日]]） - [[由井正雪]]、軍学者・[[慶安の変]]首謀者（+ [[1651年]]） * [[享保]]18年（グレゴリオ暦[[1733年]][[6月12日]]） - [[円山応挙]]、[[画家]]（+ [[1795年]]）
== Deaths == * [[建治]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1275年]][[5月27日]]） - [[藤原為家]]、[[歌人]]（* [[1198年]]） * [[天保]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1838年]][[6月22日]]） - [[橋本宗吉]]、[[蘭学者]]・大坂蘭学の始祖（* [[1763年]]）
== Commemorations ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|4|30|5|2|4|1|6|5|0501}} ※ただし、[[小の月]]の前日は[[4月29日 (旧暦)|4月29日]]。

removing all the commented out stuff
I think this is the glitch source
attempting again to remove the lunar calendar days comments that are causing problems
removing the annoying spaces that make editing harder
putting this here so I can replace it to insert all necessary interlanguage links into it
doing a mass replace to get the proper intweriki links for all the dates

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}}.
== Events == * [[慶長]]7年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1602年]][[6月20日]]） - [[徳川家康]]が諸大名に[[二条城]]造営を命じる

== Deaths == * [[建治]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1275年]][[5月27日]]） - [[藤原為家]]、[[歌人]]（* [[1198年]]） * [[天保]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1838年]][[6月22日]]） - [[橋本宗吉]]、[[蘭学者]]・大坂蘭学の始祖（* [[1763年]]）

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}}.

== Deaths == * [[建治]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1275年]][[5月27日]]） - [[藤原為家]]、[[歌人]]（* [[1198年]]） * [[天保]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1838年]][[6月22日]]） - [[橋本宗吉]]、[[蘭学者]]・大坂蘭学の始祖（* [[1763年]]）

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}}.
== Events == * [[慶長]]7年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1602年]][[6月20日]]） - [[徳川家康]]が諸大名に[[二条城]]造営を命じる

== Deaths == * [[建治]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1275年]][[5月27日]]） - [[藤原為家]]、[[歌人]]（* [[1198年]]） * [[天保]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1838年]][[6月22日]]） - [[橋本宗吉]]、[[蘭学者]]・大坂蘭学の始祖（* [[1763年]]）

[[sn:May 1 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 5월 1일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 1 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月1日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 1일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初一]] [[zh:五月初一]] [[en:draft:May 1 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar May}} '''May 1''' is the 1st day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}}.
== Events == * [[慶長]]7年（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1602]][[6月20日]]） - [[徳川家康]]が諸大名に[[二条城]]造営を命じる
== Births == * [[慶長]]10年（グレゴリオ暦[[1605]][[6月17日]]） - [[由井正雪]]、軍学者・[[慶安の変]]首謀者（+ [[1651]]） * [[享保]]18年（グレゴリオ暦[[1733]][[6月12日]]） - [[円山応挙]]、[[画家]]（+ [[1795]]）
== Deaths == * [[建治]]1st year（[[Julian Calendar]][[1275]][[5月27日]]） - [[藤原為家]]、[[歌人]]（* [[1198]]） * [[天保]]9年（グレゴリオ暦[[1838]][[6月22日]]） - [[橋本宗吉]]、[[蘭学者]]・大坂蘭学の始祖（* [[1763]]）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|4|30|5|2|4|1|6|5|0501}} [[Category:removing this]][[sn:4月29日 (旧暦)|4月29日]]。

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * [[Keichō]] 7th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1602]] [[June 20]] ） - [[徳川家康]] が諸大名に[[二条城]] 造営を命じる
== Births == * [[Keichō]] 10th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1605]] [[June 17]] ） - [[由井正雪]] 、軍学者・[[慶安の変]] 首謀者（+ [[1651]] ） * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 18th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1733]] [[June 12]] ） - [[円山応挙]] 、[[画家]] （+ [[1795]] ）
== Deaths == * [[建治]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1275]] [[May 27]] ） - [[藤原為家]] 、[[歌人]] （* [[1198]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1838]] [[June 22]] ） - [[橋本宗吉]] 、[[蘭学者]] ・大坂蘭学の始祖（* [[1763]] ）

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * [[Keichō]] 7th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1602]] [[June 20]] ） - [[徳川家康]] が諸大名に[[Nijō Castle]] 造営を命じる
== Births == * [[Keichō]] 10th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1605]] [[June 17]] ） - [[由井正雪]] 、軍学者・[[慶安の変]] 首謀者（+ [[1651]] ） * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 18th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1733]] [[June 12]] ） - [[円山応挙]] 、[[Painter]] （+ [[1795]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Kenji]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1275]] [[May 27]] ） - [[藤原為家]] 、{{ill|Waka poet|ja|歌人}} （* [[1198]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1838]] [[June 22]] ） - [[橋本宗吉]] 、[[Rangaku Scholar]] ・大坂蘭学の始祖（* [[1763]] ）

[[sn:May 1 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 1일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 1 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月1日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 1일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初一]] [[zh:五月初一]] [[en:draft:May 1 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 1''' is the 1st day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * [[Keichō]] 7th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1602]] [[June 20]] ） - [[Tokugawa Ieyasu]] が諸大名に[[Nijō Castle]] 造営を命じる
== Births == * [[Keichō]] 10th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1605]] [[June 17]] ） - [[由井正雪]] 、軍学者・[[慶安の変]] 首謀者（+ [[1651]] ） * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 18th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1733]] [[June 12]] ） - [[円山応挙]] 、[[Painter]] （+ [[1795]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Kenji]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1275]] [[May 27]] ） - [[藤原為家]] 、{{ill|Waka poet|ja|歌人}} （* [[1198]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1838]] [[June 22]] ） - [[橋本宗吉]] 、[[Rangaku Scholar]] ・大坂蘭学の始祖（* [[1763]] ）

[[sn:May 1 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 1일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 1 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月1日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 1일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初一]] [[zh:五月初一]] [[en:draft:May 1 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 1''' is the 1st day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * [[Keichō]] 7th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1602]] [[June 20]] ） - [[Tokugawa Ieyasu]] が諸大名に[[Nijō Castle]] 造営を命じる
== Births == * [[Keichō]] 10th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1605]] [[June 17]] ） - [[由井正雪]] 、軍学者・[[慶安の変]] 首謀者（+ [[1651]] ） * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 18th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1733]] [[June 12]] ） - [[円山応挙]] 、[[Painter]] （+ [[1795]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Kenji]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1275]] [[May 27]] ） - [[藤原為家]] 、{{ill|Waka poet|ja|歌人}} （* [[1198]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1838]] [[June 22]] ） - [[橋本宗吉]] 、[[Rangaku Scholar]] ・大坂蘭学の始祖（* [[1763]] ）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|4|30|5|2|4|1|6|5|0501}} [[Category:removing this]] [[sn:4月29日 (旧暦)|4月29日]] 。

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * [[Keichō]] 7th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1602]] [[June 20]] ） - [[Tokugawa Ieyasu]] が諸大名に[[Nijō Castle]] 造営を命じる
== Births == * [[Keichō]] 10th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1605]] [[June 17]] ） - [[由井正雪]] 、軍学者・[[慶安の変]] 首謀者（+ [[1651]] ） * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保}} 18th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1733]] [[June 12]] ） - [[円山応挙]] 、[[Painter]] （+ [[1795]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Kenji]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1275]] [[May 27]] ） - [[藤原為家]] 、{{ill|Waka poet|ja|歌人}} （* [[1198]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1838]] [[June 22]] ） - [[橋本宗吉]] 、[[Rangaku Scholar]] ・大坂蘭学の始祖（* [[1763]] ）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==

[[cdo:5 nguŏk 1 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初一]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 1''' is the 1st day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May|12=draft}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安|12=draft}} .
== Events == * [[Keichō]] 7th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1602]] [[June 20]] ） - [[Tokugawa Ieyasu]] が諸大名に[[Nijō Castle]] 造営を命じる
== Births == * [[Keichō]] 10th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1605]] [[June 17]] ） - [[由井正雪]] 、軍学者・[[慶安の変]] 首謀者（+ [[1651]] ） * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保|12=draft}} 18th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1733]] [[June 12]] ） - [[円山応挙]] 、[[Painter]] （+ [[1795]] ）
== Deaths == * [[Kenji]] 1st year（[[Julian calendar]] [[1275]] [[May 27]] ） - [[藤原為家]] 、{{ill|Waka poet|ja|歌人|12=draft}} （* [[1198]] ） * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft}} 9th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1838]] [[June 22]] ） - [[橋本宗吉]] 、[[Rangaku Scholar]] ・大坂蘭学の始祖（* [[1763]] ）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|4|30|5|2|4|1|6|5|0501}} 。
[[cdo:5 nguŏk 1 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初一]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 1 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初一]]
[[cdo:5 nguŏk 1 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初一]]
==References== {{reflist}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunisolar Months}}
{{draft categories| [[Category:removing this]] [[Category:Untranslated Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:Pages to be translated]][[sn:May 1 (Lunisolar)]][[Category:Pages to be translated]] [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] [[Category: pages]] [[Category:deprecated s front]] [[Category:deprecated s back]] [[Category:q]] [[Category:Lunisolar May]] [[Category:Taian]] [[Category:Days 1 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:Lunisolar]] [[Category:return the see also]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]] [[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]] }} [[sn:May 1 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 1일]] [[ja:5月1日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:五月初一]] [[en:draft:May 1 (Lunisolar)]] [[sn:4月29日 (旧暦)|4月29日]] [[en:5月1日 (旧暦)]] [[sn:5月1日 (旧暦)]] [[sn:May 1日 (旧暦)]] [[sn:ay 1 (Lunisolar)]]

[[cdo:5 nguŏk 1 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初一]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 1''' is the 1st day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May|12=draft}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Keichō|de|Keichō|ja|慶長|zh|Keichō}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|de|Gregorischer Kalender|ja|グレゴリオ暦|zh|公历}} {{ill|1602|de|1602|ja|1602|zh|1602}} {{ill|June 20|de|20. Juni|ja|6月20日|zh|6月20日}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|de|Tokugawa Ieyasu|ja|徳川家康|zh|德川家康}} ordered the feudal lords to construct {{ill|Nijō Castle|de|Nijō-Schloss|ja|二条城|zh|二条城}}.
== Births == * {{ill|Keichō|de|Keichō|ja|慶長|zh|Keichō}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|de|Gregorischer Kalender|ja|グレゴリオ暦|zh|公历}} {{ill|1605|de|1605|ja|1605|zh|1605}} {{ill|June 17|de|17. Juni|ja|6月17日|zh|6月17日}}) – {{ill|Yui Masayuki|de|Yui Masayuki|ja|由井正雪|zh|由井正雪}}, military scholar and instigator of the {{ill|Keian Incident|de|Keian-Zwischenfall|ja|慶安の変|zh|庆安之变}} ( + {{ill|1651|de|1651|ja|1651|zh|1651}} ) * {{ill|Kyōhō|ja|享保|12=draft}} 18th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|de|Gregorischer Kalender|ja|グレゴリオ暦|zh|公历}} {{ill|1733|de|1733|ja|1733|zh|1733}} {{ill|June 12|de|12. Juni|ja|6月12日|zh|6月12日}}) – {{ill|Maruyama Ōkyo|de|Maruyama Ōkyo|ja|円山応挙|zh|円山应挙}}, {{ill|Painter|de|Maler|ja|画家|zh|画家}} ( + {{ill|1795|de|1795|ja|1795|zh|1795}} )
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kenji|de|Kenji|ja|建治|zh|Kenji}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|de|Julianischer Kalender|ja|ユリウス暦|zh|儒略历}} {{ill|1275|de|1275|ja|1275|zh|1275}} {{ill|May 27|de|27. Mai|ja|5月27日|zh|5月27日}}) – {{ill|Fujiwara Tameie|de|Fujiwara Tameie|ja|藤原為家|zh|藤原為家}}, {{ill|Waka poet|ja|歌人|12=draft}} ( * {{ill|1198|de|1198|ja|1198|zh|1198}} ) * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft}} 9th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|de|Gregorischer Kalender|ja|グレゴリオ暦|zh|公历}} {{ill|1838|de|1838|ja|1838|zh|1838}} {{ill|June 22|de|22. Juni|ja|6月22日|zh|6月22日}}) – {{ill|Hashimoto Sōkichi|de|Hashimoto Sōkichi|ja|橋本宗吉|zh|橋本宗吉}}, {{ill|Rangaku Scholar|de|Rangaku Scholar|ja|蘭学者|zh|Rangaku Scholar}} and the founder of Osaka Rangaku ( * {{ill|1763|de|1763|ja|1763|zh|1763}} )
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|4|30|5|2|4|1|6|5|0501}} 。

[[cdo:5 nguŏk 1 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初一]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 1''' is the 1st day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May|12=draft|12=draft}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}}. == Events == * {{ill|Keichō|de|Keichō|ja|慶長|zh|Keichō|12=draft}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|de|Gregorischer Kalender|ja|グレゴリオ暦|zh|公历|12=draft}} {{ill|1602|de|1602|ja|1602|zh|1602|12=draft}} {{ill|June 20|de|20. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 1일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 1''' is the 1st day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|qid=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|qq=|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}}.

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 1일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 1''' is the 1st day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|qq=|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1602|1602]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] ordered the feudal lords to construct [[:en:Nijō Castle|Nijō Castle]]. == Births == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1605|1605]] [[:en:June 17|June 17]]) – [[:en:Yui Shōsetsu|Yui Masayuki]], a military scholar and instigator of the [[:en:Keian Uprising|Keian Incident]] (died [[:en:1651|1651]]). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 18th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1733|1733]] [[:en:June 12|June 12]]) – [[:en:Maruyama Ōkyo|Maruyama Ōkyo]], a painter (died [[:en:1795|1795]]). == Deaths == * [[:en:Kenji (era)|Kenji]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1275|1275]] [[:en:May 27|May 27]]) – [[:en:Fujiwara no Tameie|Fujiwara Tameie]], a waka poet (born [[:en:1198|1198]]). == Commemorations ==

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 1 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月1日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 1일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月初一]][[zh:五月初一]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839592]] Wikidata name: 1st day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:06, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 1|qq=May 1}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 1일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 1''' is the 1st day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1602|1602]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] ordered the feudal lords to construct [[:en:Nijō Castle|Nijō Castle]]. == Births == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1605|1605]] [[:en:June 17|June 17]]) – [[:en:Yui Shōsetsu|Yui Masayuki]], a military scholar and instigator of the [[:en:Keian Uprising|Keian Incident]] (died [[:en:1651|1651]]). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 18th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1733|1733]] [[:en:June 12|June 12]]) – [[:en:Maruyama Ōkyo|Maruyama Ōkyo]], a painter (died [[:en:1795|1795]]). == Deaths == * [[:en:Kenji (era)|Kenji]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1275|1275]] [[:en:May 27|May 27]]) – [[:en:Fujiwara no Tameie|Fujiwara Tameie]], a waka poet (born [[:en:1198|1198]]). == Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|4|30|5|2|4|1|6|5|0501|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
[[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初一]]
{{translated page|ja|5月1日 (旧暦)|version=97894698|comment=Imported full ja history}}
{{draft categories|
[[Category:Completion tier 7]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] [[Category:Lunisolar May]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]][[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Taian]] [[Category:Days 1 of Japanese Lunar months]]
}}

[[ko:음력 5월 1일]] [[ja:5月1日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:五月初一]]
[[ar:May 1 (Lunisolar)]]
[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初一]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月初一]] {{wikidata link|Q839592}}

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 1일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 1''' is the 1st day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1602|1602]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] ordered the feudal lords to construct [[:en:Nijō Castle|Nijō Castle]]. == Births == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1605|1605]] [[:en:June 17|June 17]]) – [[:en:Yui Shōsetsu|Yui Masayuki]], a military scholar and instigator of the [[:en:Keian Uprising|Keian Incident]] (died [[:en:1651|1651]]). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 18th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1733|1733]] [[:en:June 12|June 12]]) – [[:en:Maruyama Ōkyo|Maruyama Ōkyo]], a painter (died [[:en:1795|1795]]). == Deaths == * [[:en:Kenji (era)|Kenji]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1275|1275]] [[:en:May 27|May 27]]) – [[:en:Fujiwara no Tameie|Fujiwara Tameie]], a waka poet (born [[:en:1198|1198]]). == Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|4|30|5|2|4|1|6|5|0501|qq=}}

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 1일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 1''' is the 1st day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1602|1602]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] ordered the feudal lords to construct [[:en:Nijō Castle|Nijō Castle]]. == Births == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1605|1605]] [[:en:June 17|June 17]]) – [[:en:Yui Shōsetsu|Yui Masayuki]], a military scholar and instigator of the [[:en:Keian Uprising|Keian Incident]] (died [[:en:1651|1651]]). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 18th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1733|1733]] [[:en:June 12|June 12]]) – [[:en:Maruyama Ōkyo|Maruyama Ōkyo]], a painter (died [[:en:1795|1795]]). == Deaths == * [[:en:Kenji (era)|Kenji]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1275|1275]] [[:en:May 27|May 27]]) – [[:en:Fujiwara no Tameie|Fujiwara Tameie]], a waka poet (born [[:en:1198|1198]]). == Commemorations ==

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 1 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月1日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 1일]][[zh_min_nan:5 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:五月初一]][[zh:五月初一]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 1 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月1日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 1일]][[zh_min_nan:5 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:五月初一]][[zh:五月初一]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 1 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月1日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 1일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 1 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月初一]][[zh:五月初一]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839592]] Wikidata name: 1st day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:06, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 1|qq=May 1}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月初一|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 1일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 1''' is the 1st day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1602|1602]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] ordered the feudal lords to construct [[:en:Nijō Castle|Nijō Castle]]. == Births == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1605|1605]] [[:en:June 17|June 17]]) – [[:en:Yui Shōsetsu|Yui Masayuki]], a military scholar and instigator of the [[:en:Keian Uprising|Keian Incident]] (died [[:en:1651|1651]]). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 18th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1733|1733]] [[:en:June 12|June 12]]) – [[:en:Maruyama Ōkyo|Maruyama Ōkyo]], a painter (died [[:en:1795|1795]]). == Deaths == * [[:en:Kenji (era)|Kenji]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1275|1275]] [[:en:May 27|May 27]]) – [[:en:Fujiwara no Tameie|Fujiwara Tameie]], a waka poet (born [[:en:1198|1198]]). == Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|4|30|5|2|4|1|6|5|0501|qq=}}

== Events == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 7th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1602|1602]] [[:en:June 20|June 20]]) – [[:en:Tokugawa Ieyasu|Tokugawa Ieyasu]] ordered the feudal lords to construct [[:en:Nijō Castle|Nijō Castle]]. == Births == * [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1605|1605]] [[:en:June 17|June 17]]) – [[:en:Yui Shōsetsu|Yui Masayuki]], a military scholar and instigator of the [[:en:Keian Uprising|Keian Incident]] (died [[:en:1651|1651]]). * [[:en:Kyōhō|Kyōhō]] 18th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1733|1733]] [[:en:June 12|June 12]]) – [[:en:Maruyama Ōkyo|Maruyama Ōkyo]], a painter (died [[:en:1795|1795]]). == Deaths == * [[:en:Kenji (era)|Kenji]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1275|1275]] [[:en:May 27|May 27]]) – [[:en:Fujiwara no Tameie|Fujiwara Tameie]], a waka poet (born [[:en:1198|1198]]). == Commemorations ==

== Events == * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō}} 7th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1602|en|1602|WD=Q6727|lt=1602}} {{ill|June 20|en|June 20|WD=Q2666|lt=June 20}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Ieyasu|en|Tokugawa Ieyasu|WD=Q171977|lt=Tokugawa Ieyasu}} ordered the feudal lords to construct {{ill|Nijō Castle|en|Nijō Castle|WD=Q1013399|lt=Nijō Castle}}. == Births == * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1605|en|1605|WD=Q6741|lt=1605}} {{ill|June 17|en|June 17|WD=Q2672|lt=June 17}}) – {{ill|Yui Shōsetsu|en|Yui Shōsetsu|WD=Q8060473|lt=Yui Masayuki}}, a military scholar and instigator of the {{ill|Keian Uprising|en|Keian Uprising|WD=Q6383559|lt=Keian Incident}} (died {{ill|1651|en|1651|WD=Q6956|lt=1651}}). * {{ill|Kyōhō|en|Kyōhō|WD=Q1145048|lt=Kyōhō}} 18th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1733|en|1733|WD=Q6972|lt=1733}} {{ill|June 12|en|June 12|WD=Q2619|lt=June 12}}) – {{ill|Maruyama Ōkyo|en|Maruyama Ōkyo|WD=Q405444|lt=Maruyama Ōkyo}}, a painter (died {{ill|1795|en|1795|WD=Q7815|lt=1795}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Kenji (era)|en|Kenji (era)|WD=Q1327993|lt=Kenji}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1275|en|1275|WD=Q5529|lt=1275}} {{ill|May 27|en|May 27|WD=Q2587|lt=May 27}}) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Tameie|en|Fujiwara no Tameie|WD=Q535938|lt=Fujiwara Tameie}}, a waka poet (born {{ill|1198|en|1198|WD=Q19750|lt=1198}}). == Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|4|30|5|2|4|1|6|5|0501|qq=}}
